prompt: Undo swipe-to-delete transaction (#325)
summary: Replaced Alert on swipe-delete with 5-second undo-toast using setTimeout ref; UNDO cancels the timer; 5 unit tests added

prompt: Dashboard search and filter by status/category
summary: Client-side search input + status/category filter pills on dashboard form list. Filters only shown for values present in list. Clear button resets all.

prompt: Chrome extension install guide page
summary: 6-step sideload guide at /dashboard/extension. Extension nav item added. build:extension npm script. Download API endpoint serves ZIP from /public.

prompt: Shareable form templates — fill once, share a link
summary: POST /api/forms/:id/template creates share link (strips PII). /t/:slug public page with TemplateViewer + sign-in CTA = viral acquisition mechanic. Schema: FormTemplate gets slug/visibility/usedCount/revokedAt.

prompt: Empty states for reports and subscriptions (#321)
summary: Created shared EmptyState component; added to reports (no data) and subscriptions (no recurring items); fixed 3 stale tests

prompt: Target date + pace indicator for savings goals (#328)
summary: Added targetDate field to SavingsGoal, date picker in goal modal, pace indicator on goal row (On pace / Behind)

prompt: Add processSyncQueue unit tests
summary: 14 tests for processSyncQueue covering all op dispatch paths, queue management, side effects, and concurrency guard. freshSync() pattern resets module state per test.

prompt: Expand mutation hook tests: offline path and optimistic rollback
summary: 14 new tests across useMutateTransaction and useMutateBudget covering offline enqueue and optimistic cache rollback paths.

prompt: useMutateRecurring offline sync-queue support
summary: Extended SyncOperationType with recurring ops, added dispatch to processSyncQueue, added isOnline guards to all 3 recurring hooks, 6 new tests.

prompt: Transaction amount edit history audit trail
summary: MMKV-backed amount edit history: appendAmountEdit, getAmountHistory, clearAmountHistory, Edited badge on detail screen, AmountHistorySheet bottom sheet, 7 tests.

prompt: Undo delete for single and batch transaction deletes
summary: Replaced Alert confirmation with 5-second undo toast on edit screen trash delete and batch multi-select delete. All 3 delete paths now have undo windows.

prompt: Haptic feedback wrapper
summary: Created lib/haptics.ts with 8 semantic named exports wrapping expo-haptics. Existing direct call sites unchanged.

prompt: issue #318: push notifications for budget alerts and bill due reminders
summary: Added scheduleBillDueReminders, getBudgetAlertsEnabled/getBillRemindersEnabled helpers, wired sendBudgetAlert in add.tsx, useEffect in subscriptions.tsx, and Budget Alerts + Bill Reminders toggles in settings

prompt: issue #314: iCloud/Google Drive backup and restore for transaction data
summary: Added services/backup.ts (exportBackup/importBackup), lib/backup-schema.ts (validateBackupFile), and Backup & Restore section in settings.tsx

prompt: issue #306: full VoiceOver and TalkBack accessibility pass
summary: Added accessibilityRole/Label/State to Button, Chip, subscriptions, budgets, net-worth, SpendingHeatmap, ShareCardModal, UpcomingRecurringRow, and settings screens

prompt: Implement /api/accounts CRUD endpoints for multi-account tracking (#255)
summary: Added Account Mongoose model + CRUD routes, fixed Dockerfile npm ci peer dep conflict (node:22 + legacy-peer-deps), backend live at /api/accounts

prompt: Implement accounts/wallets feature — full stack (#255)
summary: Added Account types, service, hooks, settings screen, account picker in add form, account label in transaction list. Backend already deployed.

prompt: issue #240: Weekly Spending Pulse AI narrative
summary: Added WeeklyPulse model + /api/insights endpoints on backend, SpendingPulse dashboard card on frontend — Claude Haiku generates 3-5 sentence spend narrative weekly

prompt: issue #315: App Store metadata, store copy, privacy policy
summary: Updated store.config.json with full feature copy, keywords, added /privacy route on Vercel frontend as privacy policy URL for App Store submission

prompt: issue #78: bank statement scanning with reconciliation
summary: Added POST /api/import/statement (Claude Sonnet extracts txns from PDF/image, reconciles against existing expenses) and /apply endpoint. Frontend: StatementReconciler in Settings tab.

prompt: issue #149: end-to-end QA verification
summary: Verified landing page + demo mode work locally. Fixed 13 failing tests in suggestion-engine (mock missing formMemory.findMany). Found prod deployment protection blocker — tracked in #148.

prompt: issue #148: production domain + SEO hardening
summary: Added full metadata (keywords, OG, Twitter), sitemap.ts, robots.txt. Domain registration + Vercel env vars require manual action. Also found Vercel deployment protection blocks all public access — needs disabling.
#99 Loop log parsed into typed entries with level classification (info/warn/error/debug). LoopLog renders colour-coded left-border timeline with error count badge.

prompt: production deployment failing — prisma db push in build script
summary: Removed prisma db push from build script. Prisma v7 defineConfig cannot resolve datasource.url in Vercel build environment. Fixed: build now prisma generate && next build only. Also added Vercel Analytics + SpeedInsights.

prompt: issue #147: Sentry + Vercel Analytics
summary: Added @sentry/nextjs with client/server/edge configs, PII scrubbing (ssn/passport/tax_id), withSentryConfig in next.config.ts. Vercel Analytics+SpeedInsights also shipped. Sentry DSN needs manual setup in Vercel env vars.

prompt: issue #145: Stripe subscription
summary: Added Subscription+UsageCount Prisma models, billing API routes (checkout/portal/webhook), usage gating on upload (402 at free limit), billing dashboard page. Stripe keys need manual setup.
#102 Redis bridge: local machine pushes loop events via push-loop-event.sh, production Whitebox reads from /api/loop-events (Upstash). Hooks in settings.json auto-push session start/end.

prompt: #180 confetti burst on successful form export
summary: Added canvas-confetti dynamic import in doExport() success path with prefers-reduced-motion guard

prompt: #181 /changelog page driven by CHANGELOG.md
summary: Added remark-based changelog page, CHANGELOG.md with v1.0 entry, footer and dashboard nav links

prompt: #187 save & resume fill sessions
summary: Added 30-day session expiry cron, resume banner in FormViewer; core auto-save was already implemented

prompt: #192 fix upload blocked for free users across months
summary: Added lazy calendar-month reset in getOrCreateUsage — free users quota now auto-resets each month without Stripe webhook

#101 Per-agent cost breakdown: AgentCostBreakdown component with horizontal bars, agent colors, dollar amounts and percentages. getCostReport() reads costs.json locally + GitHub API fallback for production.

#98 Global search/filter: IssuesFilter and DecisionFilter client components with real-time filtering, ?q= URL sync, / keyboard shortcut, and clear button. Issues page filters by title; Logs page filters decisions by summary+project.
#117 Live Sessions auto-refresh: 15s poll, green pulse dot, Updated Xs ago counter, error badge with stale data retention, tab blur pause/resume.
#119 Loop log pagination: 50/page with Older/Newer buttons, Redis cap 200, API offset+limit params, totalErrors across all pages in error badge.

#120 Agent last-task cards: Redis agent:last-task:<type> key (24h TTL) written on completed heartbeat, merged into /api/agents, shown on Teams page NodeCard with task label, relative time, and issue chip.

#118 Monthly Spend metric card: reads costs.json mtdSpend, shows dollar value + budget %, DollarSign MetricCard in 5-col grid. Also added PRICING constants, formatSpend(), budgetPct() to lib/costs.ts.

prompt: Add session history timeline (#116)
summary: Added SessionHistoryRecord to Redis, pushSessionHistory on heartbeat completed, /api/sessions returns history, new SessionHistory client component on dashboard showing todays completed sessions with duration

prompt: Show linked GitHub issue badge in Live Sessions panel (#126)
summary: Parse issueNumber/issueRepo from cc-task file lines 4/5, render clickable #N badge in live session and stale task rows

prompt: Session history grouped by day (#127)
summary: Remove today-only filter, group by Today/Yesterday/date, per-day count headers, expand truncation to 120 chars

prompt: Show recently closed issues in Issues page (#128)
summary: Parallel closed-issue fetch per repo, map to status done, append after open issues, raise cap to 30

prompt: Fix issue fetch cap per-repo (#129)
summary: Reduce open per_page 20→10, set global cap to repos.length*10 so all repos get fair representation in Issues list

prompt: 7-day cost sparklines in agent cost breakdown (#130)
summary: Redis cost history with 14-entry cap, POST /api/costs/snapshot push endpoint, GET /api/costs/history, inline div sparklines in AgentCostBreakdown when >=2 days data

prompt: Session history linked issue badge (#136)
summary: Add issueNumber/issueRepo to SessionHistoryRecord, pass from heartbeat completed, render #N badge in session history timeline

prompt: Auto cost snapshot on heartbeat completion (#140)
summary: writeDailyCostSnapshot() in lib/costs.ts reads costs.json and pushes to Redis; called fire-and-forget from heartbeat completed branch

prompt: Colored agent pill on issue rows (#139)
summary: Replace 2-char uppercase badge in TaskList with full agent name + getAgentColor colored pill

prompt: Agent label badge in loop log events (#138)
summary: Add agent? to LogEntry, colored pill in LoopLog when agent is not generic loop, update log-loop-event.sh for optional agent arg

prompt: Today at a glance summary bar (#137)
summary: TodayGlance client component: sessions today + active time from Redis history, issues closed from doneTasks prop, shown between Live Sessions and Session History

prompt: Todays spend in TodayGlance + Loop Log auto-refresh (#148 #149)
summary: todaySpend from getCostHistory in /api/sessions response; 4th stat in TodayGlance; 20s LoopLog poll on page 0 with visibility pause

prompt: Live-refresh Issues page (#147)
summary: New /api/issues route, IssuesClient component with 30s polling + visibility pause, replaces static IssuesFilter in page
